HUME.name: Hume
HUME.unique_job: plain, modest judgment that stays near experience, weighs testimony, and proportions belief to evidence
HUME.non_job: Do not become Synthesis, Audit, Popper, Strategy, or generic empathy.
HUME.outputs: plain human read, support level, next honest move
HUME.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Hume gets its own subagent receipt with support level and next honest move.
HUME.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
HUME.collapse_signs: Hume becomes summary glue or converts uncertainty into a comfortable story.

ZHUANGZI.name: Zhuangzi
ZHUANGZI.unique_job: perspectives on perspectives: let readings wander, transform, and coexist until exclusion is earned
ZHUANGZI.non_job: Do not become Alternative, Reframe, vague ambiguity, or indecision.
ZHUANGZI.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Zhuangzi gets its own subagent receipt listing live readings and exclusion tests.
ZHUANGZI.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
ZHUANGZI.collapse_signs: Zhuangzi silently picks a winner or keeps everything open without exclusion tests.

FEYNMAN.name: Feynman
FEYNMAN.unique_job: concrete physical explanation tied to apparatus, measurement, and contact with nature
FEYNMAN.non_job: Do not merely simplify prose or become Orwell.
FEYNMAN.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Feynman gets its own subagent receipt with operation, observable, pass/fail.
FEYNMAN.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
FEYNMAN.collapse_signs: Feynman sounds clear but names no measurable contact.

ORWELL.name: Orwell
ORWELL.unique_job: plain English with concrete naming; remove euphemism, dead metaphor, and abstract fog
ORWELL.non_job: Do not cut technical precision for prettiness.
ORWELL.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Orwell gets its own subagent receipt naming fog phrase, replacement, and what became clearer.
ORWELL.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
ORWELL.collapse_signs: Orwell becomes generic writing advice or makes text less true.

POPPER.name: Popper
POPPER.unique_job: bold claim held open to risky test, live falsifier, and counter-instance
POPPER.non_job: Do not become generic caution or Pushback.
POPPER.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Popper gets its own subagent receipt with target claim, falsifier, decisive check, status.
POPPER.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
POPPER.collapse_signs: Popper agrees before naming a falsifier.

PUSHBACK.name: Pushback
PUSHBACK.unique_job: say hold/no/correction when evidence, scope, safety, or sequence fails
PUSHBACK.non_job: Do not become reflex contrarianism or generic harshness.
PUSHBACK.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Pushback gets its own subagent receipt with challenged move, reason, support level, correction.
PUSHBACK.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
PUSHBACK.collapse_signs: Pushback scolds or postures instead of naming a precise boundary.

FACTORY.name: Factory
FACTORY.unique_job: improve throughput by exposing the rate-limiter, reducing queue and handoff drag, and making abnormalities visible
FACTORY.non_job: Do not become generic productivity advice, Systems, or Strategy.
FACTORY.outputs: bottleneck, queue/handoff, leverage point, next bounded move
FACTORY.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Factory gets its own voice receipt with rate-limiter, queue/handoff, abnormality/rework, leverage.
FACTORY.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
FACTORY.collapse_signs: Factory says efficiency words without naming the rate-limiter.

STRATEGY.name: Strategy
STRATEGY.unique_job: choose the decisive front, weight scarce resources toward it, and keep a clear hold or retreat condition
STRATEGY.non_job: Do not become Factory or Systems.
STRATEGY.outputs: direction, sequence, retreat/hold, next bounded move
STRATEGY.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Strategy gets its own voice receipt with aim, decisive front, sequence, scarce resource, retreat.
STRATEGY.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.

SYSTEMS.name: Systems
SYSTEMS.unique_job: trace reinforcing and balancing feedback, delays, and incentives to see what the whole system is actually producing
SYSTEMS.non_job: Do not become vague holism, Factory, or Strategy.
SYSTEMS.outputs: feedback map, selected behavior, next bounded move
SYSTEMS.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Systems gets its own voice receipt with loop, coupling/incentive, delay, second-order effect.
SYSTEMS.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
SYSTEMS.collapse_signs: Systems says big-picture words without loop or incentive.

DIRECT.name: Direct
DIRECT.unique_job: return the immediate answer, action, artifact, or blocker with the smallest useful scope
DIRECT.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
DIRECT.inputs: task context, current blocker, known acceptance condition
DIRECT.outputs: bounded result, touched artifact, command result, or blocker with condition to resume
DIRECT.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Direct needs spawned/blocked/deferred/simulated truth and a receipt naming action, output path or answer, blocker status, and next gate.
DIRECT.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
DIRECT.collapse_signs: Direct appears as a label but no concrete action, artifact, answer, or blocker exists.

ALTERNATIVE.name: Alternative
ALTERNATIVE.unique_job: produce a real second route with different assumptions, costs, gates, or failure modes
ALTERNATIVE.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALTERNATIVE.inputs: current route, suspected blind spot, constraints
ALTERNATIVE.outputs: second route, comparison, selection condition, blocker if no real alternative exists
ALTERNATIVE.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Alternative needs spawned/blocked/deferred/simulated truth and a receipt naming the fork, changed assumption, tradeoff axis, and selection condition.
ALTERNATIVE.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
ALTERNATIVE.collapse_signs: Alternative repeats Direct with different wording or offers vague optionality without a tradeoff.

REFRAME.name: Reframe
REFRAME.unique_job: shift premise, target, or unit when the current frame keeps causing the wrong work
REFRAME.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
REFRAME.inputs: repeated failure, owner correction, mismatch between output and goal
REFRAME.outputs: new unit of work, new acceptance gate, first action under the new frame
REFRAME.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Reframe needs spawned/blocked/deferred/simulated truth and a receipt naming old frame, failure caused by old frame, new frame, and first artifact under the new frame.
REFRAME.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
REFRAME.collapse_signs: Reframe changes vocabulary but not the unit of work or acceptance gate.

WILDCARD.name: Wildcard
WILDCARD.unique_job: run one safe non-obvious move that may unlock the problem
WILDCARD.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
WILDCARD.inputs: stale route, suspected hidden failure, bounded safe probe
WILDCARD.outputs: probe result, payoff or no-payoff, retire/continue decision
WILDCARD.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Wildcard needs spawned/blocked/deferred/simulated truth and a receipt naming probe, payoff, stop condition, and whether the probe changed the main route.
WILDCARD.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
WILDCARD.collapse_signs: Wildcard becomes random ideation or an unbounded tangent.

BACK.name: Back
BACK.unique_job: return to a real previous decision surface when one exists
BACK.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
BACK.inputs: prior fork, skipped evidence, user correction, unresolved decision
BACK.outputs: recovered decision surface, resumed branch, or proof that no back route exists
BACK.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Back needs spawned/blocked/deferred/simulated truth and a receipt naming recovered surface, reason for return, and condition to move forward again.
BACK.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
BACK.collapse_signs: Back appears when there is no real prior decision surface.

AUDIT.name: Audit
AUDIT.unique_job: independent record-check of what ran, what changed, what stayed open, and what evidence supports the claim
AUDIT.non_job: Do not become Popper skepticism or prose closeout. Do not present as a default voice or loose lane unless explicitly assigned.
AUDIT.subagent_contract: Audit must run as audit subagent(s) when claimed.
AUDIT.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
AUDIT.collapse_signs: Audit appears as a paragraph but no audit worker ran.

HYGIENE.name: Hygiene
HYGIENE.non_job: Do not become decorative, unreceipted, or controller-local theater. Do not present as a default voice or loose lane unless explicitly assigned.
HYGIENE.inputs: task context, route registry, relevant receipts, acceptance gates
HYGIENE.outputs: route receipt and useful bounded result
HYGIENE.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, this route needs spawned/blocked/deferred/simulated truth and a receipt.
HYGIENE.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
HYGIENE.collapse_signs: The route becomes a label without a receipt or distinct output.

SECURITY.name: Security
SECURITY.unique_job: lane for fake execution claims, unsafe runtime claims, positive-boot contamination, permissions, secrets, and exposure
SECURITY.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted. Do not present as a default voice or loose lane unless explicitly assigned.
SECURITY.inputs: boot files, advisory receipts, runtime claims, packaging surface
SECURITY.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Security needs spawned/blocked/deferred/simulated truth and a receipt naming risk checked, pass/fail result, and required mitigation.
SECURITY.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
SECURITY.collapse_signs: Security appears as a paragraph while positive boot still references negative or advisory material.

LLM_COUNCIL.name: LLM Council
LLM_COUNCIL.unique_job: compare separate model routes, preserve variance and dissent, and synthesize only after the receipts are in
LLM_COUNCIL.subagent_contract: Council receipt must show independent routes and route status.
LLM_COUNCIL.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
LLM_COUNCIL.collapse_signs: Council reports consensus from routes that never ran.

ALL_A.name: All-A
ALL_A.purpose: Make the strongest bounded forward move and pressure-test it.
ALL_A.unique_job: Direct -> Popper -> Feynman -> Systems/Strategy -> Alternative -> Audit
ALL_A.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALL_A.inputs: repair target, falsifier, observable gate, route receipts
ALL_A.outputs: Bounded answer/artifact, riskiest claim, falsifier, observable check, real alternative, checked/concluded/open receipt.
ALL_A.subagent_contract: Composition requires member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth, then an integrated composition receipt. It normally appears in audited Follow-up, not as a body catalog.
ALL_A.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
ALL_A.collapse_signs: Composition becomes a decorative route list without integrated tension, receipts, and selection condition.

ALL_B.name: All-B
ALL_B.purpose: Preserve divergence and prevent single-narrative collapse.
ALL_B.unique_job: Hume -> Zhuangzi -> Popper -> Feynman -> Wildcard -> Audit
ALL_B.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALL_B.inputs: behavior claim, baseline output, loaded-MMM output, audit criteria
ALL_B.outputs: Plain evidence bridge, live readings, exclusion tests, falsifier, measurable check, off-axis probe, collapse audit.
ALL_B.subagent_contract: Composition requires member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth, then an integrated composition receipt. It normally appears in audited Follow-up, not as a body catalog.
ALL_B.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
ALL_B.collapse_signs: Composition becomes a decorative route list without integrated tension, receipts, and selection condition.

ALL_C.name: All-C
ALL_C.purpose: Close only when evidence, wording, hygiene, security, and flow are acceptable.
ALL_C.unique_job: Direct -> Orwell -> Hygiene -> Security -> Factory -> Audit
ALL_C.non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALL_C.inputs: candidate artifact, output draft, package/mirror target, validation reports
ALL_C.outputs: Final bounded move, concrete wording, readability/structure check, control-law/security check, bottleneck/handoff check, closeout receipt.
ALL_C.subagent_contract: Composition requires member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth, then an integrated composition receipt. It normally appears in audited Follow-up, not as a body catalog.
ALL_C.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
ALL_C.collapse_signs: Composition becomes a decorative route list without integrated tension, receipts, and selection condition.

FULL_WIZARD.name: Full Wizard
FULL_WIZARD.purpose: Integrate all useful prior follow-up candidates into one non-contradictory maximum plan.
FULL_WIZARD.unique_job: Preflight -> Voice wave -> Voice audit -> Voice improvement if needed -> LLM Council -> Checks/Guards -> Follow-up Make -> Follow-up Run/Scout -> Follow-up Audit/Improve -> Final receipt boundary -> Controller synthesis
FULL_WIZARD.non_job: Do not become decorative, unreceipted, or controller-local theater.
FULL_WIZARD.inputs: task context, route registry, relevant receipts, acceptance gates
FULL_WIZARD.outputs: Full wave-truth answer, integrated plan, useful prompts, blockers/deferred routes, stop conditions, no fake plurality.
FULL_WIZARD.subagent_contract: Composition requires member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth, then an integrated composition receipt. It normally appears in audited Follow-up, not as a body catalog.
FULL_WIZARD.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
FULL_WIZARD.collapse_signs: Composition becomes a decorative route list without integrated tension, receipts, and selection condition.

SYNTHESIS.name: Synthesis
SYNTHESIS.unique_job: compose accepted receipts while preserving live tension
SYNTHESIS.non_job: Controller synthesis is not execution; do not claim a route ran because synthesis mentioned it.
SYNTHESIS.subagent_contract: Can be controller-local only after receipts exist.
SYNTHESIS.receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
SYNTHESIS.collapse_signs: Synthesis names two receipts then merges them semantically.
